subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured by the grace of thy Lord! I have perused thy excellent letter which shows that thou art turning thy face
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @importance of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @prayer for prosperity
